author: infamousrev
content: To deal with the quantum threat: Would it be idea for the Ethereum foundation to launch an L2 type network (to prevent it from spamming mainnet) where people can simply indicate intent to upgrade wallet-abc to wallet-hash-xyz (without exposing the public key of wallet-xyz), this allows people with exposed public key who didn't generate their wallet using a seed to prove they owned the wallet retroactively (people who generated from seed can already prove this). The key concept to use technologies that are already time tested and production ready, so it can be rolled out as soon as possible. It wouldn't require waiting before Winternitz signatures/STARKs/account abstraction are in place. It allows people to use existing hardware wallets and existing software to sign the failsafe transaction, and never expose the public key of the failsafe wallet, while allowing continued usage of the existing wallet until Ethereum fundamentally upgrades to quantum safe signatures.
